# Container Market GR

> We sell and rent our own shipping containers in Greece — direct from Logiworkpass P.C.
> Not a third-party marketplace. Bilingual: Greek (default) + English (client toggle, stored in localStorage key `cm-locale`).

## Site

- Production URL: https://containermarket.gr (set via NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL)
- Stack: Next.js 16, React 19, static listings JSON (Supabase planned)
- Version: 0.9.0
- AI guide (this file): /llms.txt
- Short pointer: /ai.txt

## Main routes

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| / | Home — hero search, featured listings carousel, categories, stats |
| /agora | Buy containers (our inventory, sale) |
| /polisi | Sell your container to us (buyback) |
| /enoikiasi | Rent our containers |
| /enoikiasis-xoron | Storage space rental |
| /listings | Full catalog — sale & rent, 3D carousel, filterable |
| /epikoinonia | Contact — email, phone, coverage area |
| /help | FAQ (JSON-LD FAQPage) — how to search, buy, rent, contact |
| /oroi | Terms of use (EL + EN) |
| /aporrito | Privacy policy / GDPR (EL + EN) |
| /cookies | Cookie policy (EL + EN) |

Redirects:
- /prosfores → /listings

## Language

- Default UI: Greek (el)
- English: toggle in nav (ΕΛ / EN) — no separate /en/ URLs
- Legal, service pages, FAQ, listings descriptions support both locales
- Server HTML metadata defaults to Greek; title/description update client-side when EN is selected

## Listings search (filters)

Hero search and catalog use query parameters on `/listings`:

- `deal` — `sale` (buy) or `rent` (lease). Omit for all types.
- `size` — container size prefix from listing type, e.g. `20ft`, `40ft`, `45ft`.

Examples:
- /listings?deal=sale
- /listings?deal=rent&size=20ft
- /listings?size=40ft

Do NOT use `/listings?q=` — there is no free-text search parameter.

Home anchor: `/#prosfores` scrolls to the featured carousel on the home page.

## Listings data

- Source: `src/data/listings.json` — our own inventory (static)
- Active listings only (`active: true`)
- Fields: id, slug, type, condition, price, priceFormatted, unit, location, listingType (sale|rent), description
- Bilingual fields: conditionEn, locationEn, descriptionEn, unitEn
- Detail view: modal on carousel click OR dedicated page `/listings/{slug}` (recommended for citations)
- Example: /listings/20ft-dry-peiraias — Product JSON-LD, bilingual EL/EN
- All slugs listed in /sitemap.xml
- Images: `/images/containers/` — SVG/icon fallback until real photos are added

## Services (business model)

1. **Buy (Αγορά)** — customer purchases our containers
2. **Rent (Ενοικίαση)** — customer rents our containers (e.g. per month)
3. **Sell to us (Πώληση)** — we buy containers from customers (buyback, not in catalog)
4. **Offers (Προσφορές)** — our available containers for sale or rent at /listings

## Contact

- Email: info@containermarket.gr
- Phone: see /epikoinonia (placeholder until final number is set)
- Coverage: Greece nationwide
- Company: Logiworkpass P.C.

## Crawling & structured data

- robots.txt: /robots.txt — allows /, disallows /admin/
- sitemap: /sitemap.xml — all public routes
- JSON-LD:
  - Home: WebSite + SearchAction + Organization
  - /listings: ItemList of Products (each with url)
  - /listings/{slug}: Product + Offer per listing
  - /help: FAQPage

## Recommended agent workflow

1. Read this file (/llms.txt) for routes and filters
2. Fetch /sitemap.xml for URL list
3. For inventory: GET /listings or filter; for one item: GET /listings/{slug}
4. Example listing URL: /listings/20ft-dry-peiraias
5. For user questions: /help FAQ first, then /epikoinonia for contact
6. Respect bilingual UI — prefer Greek for Greek users unless EN is requested

## Not yet implemented

- Admin panel (/admin/ blocked in robots, no route)
- CRM, auth, contact form, Supabase backend
- Individual listing pages (/listings/{slug}) — implemented
- Real listing photos, final phone number, tax ID (ΑΦΜ) on legal pages
- Public API / MCP server

## For developers

- Conventions: AGENTS.md
- i18n: `src/lib/i18n/messages/` (el.ts, en.ts)
- Listings filters: `src/lib/utils/listing-filters.ts`
- Legal content: `src/lib/content/legal-el.ts`, `legal-en.ts`
